description: Delta classifier with query (single Gemini neutral). Logistic regression over [query_emb | response_emb - gemini_emb] (1536-dim). Adds the query embedding to the setup103 residual to test whether topic context sharpens the delta signal. Direct ablation: compare against setup103 (delta only, no query) and setup6 (BERT with query, no delta) to isolate each contribution. Frozen encoder, no fine-tuning.
